# WKVRCProxy wrapper SHA-256 hashes by release.
# One released wrapper per line. Maintained by .github/workflows/release.yml
# via the GraphQL createCommitOnBranch mutation. Do not edit by hand.
#
# Format: <sha256>  <version>  <iso-utc-date>
# Used by WrapperIdentity (src/WKVRCProxy.Shared/WrapperIdentity.cs) as the
# third of four "is this our binary?" signals. Released versions are matched
# here; dev builds fall through to PE metadata + embedded marker signals.
